name: Aluworks LTD
sub: Aluworks Limited is an aluminium continuous casting and cold rolling company. Our business is to produce and sell semi-finished flat-rolled sheet products for the building, construction, and household industries in Ghana and West Africa. Our principal products include (coloured, plain, mill finished or stucco embossed, roller or tension leveled) aluminium sheets-in-coil; slit coils and flat sheets; aluminium discs; plus roll-formed or corrugated sheets, ridges and louver blades.
